====Pokémon====
This listing is for Whitney's Pokémon in the Pokémon Gold & Silver: The Golden Boys manga.
{{anchor|Miltank 3}}{{TrainerPoké
|width=74
|main=yes
|trainer=Whitney
|pkmn=Miltank
|gender=female
|type1=Normal
|img=Whitney Miltank Golden Boys.png
|epnum=GB08
|epname=For Pikachu's Sake!! The Search For The Missing Farfetch'd
|desc={{p|Miltank}} is Whitney's signature Pokémon. She was relied on as a mode of transportation.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|width=74
|trainer=Whitney
|pkmn=Cleffa
|type1=Normal
|img=Whitney Cleffa Golden Boys.png
|epnum=GB08
|epname=For Pikachu's Sake!! The Search For The Missing Farfetch'd
|desc={{p|Cleffa}} is Whitney's Pokémon that is usually seen out of its Poké Ball. It helped Whitney search for a {{p|Farfetch'd}}. When they found it, Cleffa sang a lullaby to place it to sleep. Cleffa was responsible for taking the [[Squirt Bottle|SquirtBottle]] to awaken the Sudowoodo that Gold caught later on.

Cleffa's only known move is {{m|Sing}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Whitney
|pkmn=Ditto
|type1=Normal
|img=Whitney Ditto Golden Boys.png
|epnum=GB08
|epname=For Pikachu's Sake!! The Search For The Missing Farfetch'd
|desc={{p|Ditto}} was sent out to battle {{p|Pidgey}}. Since Ditto made a replica of Pidgey, Pidgey was not able to keep up with Ditto.

Ditto's only move is {{m|Transform}}.}}

{{TrainerPoké
|trainer=Whitney
|pkmn=Magby
|type1=Fire
|img=Whitney Magby Golden Boys.png
|epnum=GB10
|epname=A Huge Mysterious Tree!!
|desc=Whitney owns a Pokémon that is not her specialty type, {{p|Magby}}. However, she still thinks that it is cute due to it being a baby Pokémon.

Magby's only known move is {{m|Flamethrower}}.}}
